title: Indulgent Garlic Pilaf
description: A rich and savory pilaf infused with the deep flavors of garlic, perfect as a side dish or light meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add uncooked pilaf and stir to coat with oil and garlic.
Pour in chicken broth, salt, and black pepper. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until liquid is absorbed.
Stir in remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Garnish with chopped parsley if desired.
